term.description: The display name of the glossary term.

type.description: The category of this glossary term, used to display a type icon in the header.

summary.description: A brief one-line summary shown in the collapsible header next to the term name.

description.description: A detailed markdown description shown when the collapsible section is expanded.

deprecation_notice.description: A markdown deprecation notice. When present, the term is marked as deprecated with a badge in the header and this content is rendered as a warning alert at the top of the expanded section.

references.description: A list of references related to this term.

type.description: The type of reference: 'term' links to another glossary term, 'internal-docs' links to a page within the Panfactum docs, 'external-docs' links to an external website.

label.description: Display text for the reference link.

link.description: The URL or path for the reference. For 'term' type, use the term slug. For 'internal-docs', use the docs path. For 'external-docs', use the full URL.
